case_title: THE ADMINISTRATORS OF THE TULANAE EDUCAATIONAL VS. MARC HOLDER

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE ADMINISTRATORS OF THE TULANE EDUCATIONAL FUND AS TO DEFENDANT HOLDER, MARC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE ADMINISTRATORS OF THE TULANE EDUCATIONAL FUND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLDER, MARC $877.83 PRINCIPAL, $270.52 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,301.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
